summary: Hardened the Hyprland JSON parser mutation surface by adding focused parser tests, tightening JSON number grammar, and reshaping cursor progress helpers to eliminate the parser timeout cluster.

acceptanceEvidence.criterion: Evidence records the full workspace mutation baseline from main, including 105 missed mutants and 4 timeouts.
acceptanceEvidence.evidence: evidence/m4-hyprland-parser-mutation-hardening/notes.md records: 751 mutants tested in 8m: 105 missed, 302 caught, 340 unviable, 4 timeouts.

acceptanceEvidence.criterion: Focused tests cover the Hyprland parser missed and timeout mutant cluster in crates/hyprland/src/model/parser.rs.
acceptanceEvidence.evidence: Added parser unit tests for string control characters, Unicode escapes, number grammar boundaries, trailing input, cursor progress, and is_finished behavior.

acceptanceEvidence.criterion: Run a targeted mutation check for the parser cluster if feasible, or document residual parser survivors.
acceptanceEvidence.evidence: Final targeted run: cargo mutants -p madobe-hyprland --file crates/hyprland/src/model/parser.rs --timeout 120 --jobs 2 --all-features. Result: 78 mutants tested in 25s: 35 caught, 43 unviable.
Final run passed after removing generated cargo-mutants output directories that violated lint-lines.

commandsRun.command: nix develop -c cargo mutants -p madobe-hyprland --file crates/hyprland/src/model/parser.rs --timeout 120 --jobs 2 --all-features

realWorldValidation.evidence: This node hardens parser unit and mutation coverage only.
